product: Agent Bricks Supervisor Agent now supports custom MCP servers and custom…
tagline: You can now add custom MCP servers and custom agents hosted in Databricks Apps as subagents in your Supervisor Agent.
what_it_does: You can now add custom MCP servers and custom agents hosted in Databricks Apps as subagents in your Supervisor Agent. This page describes how to use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks. You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
why_it_matters: You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
